hooks.command: sh -c 'msg=$(jq -er ".message" 2>/dev/null || { echo "Invalid notification JSON" >&2; exit 1; }); terminal-notifier -title "Claude Code" -message "$msg" -group "claude-code" -sound "default"'
jq -r '.tool_input?.filePath // .tool_input?.file_path // error("Missing filePath or file_path in tool_input")' | xargs bun run eslint --cache --fix --max-warnings=0 1>&2 || exit 2
